---
title: Walter Dal'Maz Silva
subtitle: Professional Portfolio & Technical Research
description: |
    Personal portfolio, curriculum vitae, and research notes of
    Walter Dal'Maz Silva, Ph.D. specializing in physical and
    data-driven modeling.
keywords:
  - Materials Science
  - Data Science
  - Physical Modeling
  - Scientific Computing
format:
  html:
    css: _assets/index.css
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    margin-left: auto
    margin-right: auto
    max-width: 960px
---

::: {.logo-header}
![](_assets/logo.svg){.brand-logo}
:::

## Published Resources

Explore the compiled curriculum, articles, and research materials:

::: {.portfolio-grid}

::: {.portfolio-card}
### Curriculum Vitae

Detailed professional background covering PhD research in Materials Science, industrial experience in metallurgy and combustion, key publications, and core technical competencies.

- [View Webpage](curriculum/curriculum.html){.action-btn .btn-primary}
- [Download PDF](curriculum/curriculum.pdf){.action-btn .btn-secondary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
### A Chemical Plant MPC

Development of a nonlinear MPC for a continuous stirred-tank reactor (CSTR) for educational purposes using algorithmic differentiation through [CasADi](https://web.casadi.org/).

- [Read Article](shorts/chemical-plant-mpc.html){.action-btn .btn-primary}
- [Download PDF](shorts/chemical-plant-mpc.pdf){.action-btn .btn-secondary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
### Scientific Computing

In this short article we discuss the core principles of scientific computing, with emphasis on the usage of the computer to establish reproducible research workflows. It summarizes my way of working and toolkit.

- [Read Article](shorts/scientific-computing.html){.action-btn .btn-primary}
- [Download PDF](shorts/scientific-computing.pdf){.action-btn .btn-secondary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
### How Many More Points?

An empirical investigation into data stream convergence using Welford's algorithm for recursive mean and variance estimation. Analyzes stability using confidence intervals and statistical error metrics.

- [Read Article](shorts/recursive-mean.html){.action-btn .btn-primary}
- [Download PDF](shorts/recursive-mean.pdf){.action-btn .btn-secondary}
:::

:::

## Contact & Links

You can get in touch or explore my code repositories:

::: {.social-links}
- [Explore GitHub](https://github.com/wallytutor){.social-btn .github-btn}
- [Send Email](mailto:walter.dalmazsilva@gmail.com){.social-btn .email-btn}
:::

::: {.site-footer}
&copy; 2026 Walter Dal'Maz Silva. Built with Quarto.
:::
